title: sambucus javanica var. formosana
intro: Sambucus javanica var. formosana, also known as Formosan elder or Taiwan elderberry, is a plant species belonging to the Sambucus genus of flowering plants. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its rich content of anthocyanins and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Formosan elderberry include its potential in reducing fever, alleviating cold and flu symptoms, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Formosan elderberry, such as teas, tinctures, and extracts, are often used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
